posts.text: If humans are treated as something to be “perfected or surpassed”, it becomes easier to believe some lives are “less worthy”, warned the Pope in a letter cautioning against posthumanism https://www.economist.com/europe/2026/05/28/leos-first-encyclical-attacks-technological-messianism?taid=6a1a945916ca9c0001d5a897&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
“So I get that your energy fund got flat-footed by COVID, but how did you lose this much as inventory drew 12mm bbl/d??”

Bet this is gonna be the first question for every energy GP during a DD call for the rest of this decade…
posts.author: hkuppy
